zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany於1340年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾登東納爾德時，他的父親Robert II Stewart King of Scotland24歲，母親Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan20歲。他於1361年9月9日與Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith在蘇格蘭艾斯爾凱爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1420年9月3日在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林享年80歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林登福姆林 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany于1340年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾登東納爾德时，他的父亲Robert II Stewart King of Scotland24岁，母亲Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan20岁。他于1361年9月9日与Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith在苏格兰艾斯爾凱爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1420年9月3日在英国苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林享年80岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林登福姆林 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany was born in 1340, in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Robert II Stewart King of Scotland, was 24 and his mother, Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan, was 20. He married Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith on 9 September 1361, in Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died on 3 September 1420, in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 80, and was buried in Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany est né en 1340, à Dundonald, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert II Stewart King of Scotland, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith le 9 septembre 1361, à Kyle, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 3 septembre 1420, à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albanyが1340年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアダンドナルドで生まれた時，父Robert II Stewart King of Scotlandは24歳，母Elizabeth Mure of Rowallanは20歳であった。1361年9月9日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクイルでMargaret Graham Countess of Menteithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1420年9月3日にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスティルリングで80歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインダンフエルムライン アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany(이)가 1340년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 던도널드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert II Stewart King of Scotland(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1361년 9월 9일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 키일에서 Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1420년 9월 3일 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인 던퍼라이인 애브브이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany родился в 1340 г. в местности дундональд, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert II Stewart King of Scotland было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith 9 сентября 1361 г. в местности кил, аиршир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер 3 сентября 1420 г. в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности дунфирмлаин эбби, дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания.
